[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000010010 2
1 010100000 2
2 000000111 3
3 010000000 1
4 000000100 1
5 010100000 2
6 000000010 1
7 010000000 1

01 10 000000011 2
12 21 000000110 2
23 32 010010110 4
34 43 010000100 2
45 54 000100000 1
56 65 000100000 1
67 76 000000000 a
70 07 000000001 1

02 20 010000010 2
13 31 000000110 2
24 42 010000100 2
35 53 000010010 2 match 0
46 64 010100000 2 match 1 5
57 75 000000000 a
60 06 010100000 2 match 1 5
71 17 000000101 2

03 30 010001010 3
14 41 000000100 1 match 4
25 52 000010010 2 match 0
36 63 010000000 1 match 3 7
47 74 000000100 1 match 4
50 05 000100010 2
61 16 000000000 a
72 27 000000100 1 match 4

04 40 010100000 2 match 1 5
15 51 000000010 1 match 6
26 62 010000000 1 match 3 7
37 73 000000100 1 match 4
